name: adguardhome-sync
tagline: A synchronization tool for managing multiple AdGuard Home instances
description: AdGuardHome Sync automatically synchronizes exact config and filter settings across multiple AdGuard Home instances. It helps users running multi-router or distributed setups manage consistent filtering rules without manual effort.

features.title: Configuration Synchronization
features.description: Synchronizes AdGuard Home settings between multiple instances

features.title: Rule and Filter Sync
features.description: Keeps blocklists and custom rules consistent across servers

features.title: Scheduled Sync Jobs
features.description: Runs synchronization tasks automatically at defined intervals

features.title: Multi-Instance Support
features.description: Manages synchronization across more than two AdGuard Home nodes
